ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "origin" INTEGER /* Origin of the vehicle (e.g., domestic or import) */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle's engine */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration time from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "kilometer_per_liter" REAL /* Fuel efficiency measured in kilometers per liter */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the manufacturer */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the vehicle type */,
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the fuel type */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle (e.g., Luxury, Sport) */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., Compact, Midsize, Full-size) */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard the vehicle meets (e.g., Euro 6, US EPA 2022) */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year production started */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year production ended */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the vehicle record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the manufacturer was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the manufacturer record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the vehicle type */,
  "cargo_capacity" REAL /* Cargo capacity of the vehicle type */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the vehicle type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specs" (
  "engine_spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V6, V8) */,
  "turbocharged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the engine is turbocharged */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity in liters */,
  "fuel_system" TEXT /* Type of fuel system (e.g., MPI, GDI) */,
  "valve_configuration" TEXT /* Valve configuration (e.g., DOHC, SOHC) */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio of the engine */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the engine specification record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the vehicle */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., acceleration, braking distance) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric (e.g., Manufacturer, Independent Testing) */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the performance metric was measured */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the performance metric record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel */,
  "fuel_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the fuel (e.g., Premium, Regular) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the fuel type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the manufacturer */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., Dealership, Online) */,
  "sales_region" TEXT /* Region where the sale was made */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the salesperson */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the sales data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the vehicle */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., on a scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments left by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., Customer, Expert) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., Initial, Follow-up) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the vehicle review record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficiency record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the vehicle */,
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the fuel used */,
  "efficiency_value" REAL /* Fuel efficiency value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., km/L, mpg) */,
  "test_cycle" TEXT /* Test cycle used for measuring efficiency (e.g., City, Highway) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the fuel efficiency record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_fuel_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or caption for the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., Exterior, Interior) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Last update date of the vehicle image record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)
